calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Cecilia Han, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Robert Corona, Sr., et at..
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc., as follows:
Principal $2,530.26
Total Interest $893.68
Costs $392.72, for a total of $3,816.66
Judgment signed in open court.
